name: I'm Not a Hero ~The Man Who Reigned at the Top of the VR World. Reincarnates and Restarts From Level 1 as Classless~
translation-context:
Title: 俺、勇者じゃないですから。～VR世界の頂点に君臨せし男。転生し、レベル１の無職からリスタートする～. Translate as: I'm Not a Hero: The Man Who Reigned at the Top of the VR World Reincarnates and Restarts from Level 1 as Classless.

Premise: In the VRMMO Tempest, a player known as SR accomplishes the impossible: solo defeat of the final boss. Afterward, he chooses Reincarnation instead of Return, expecting something like New Game Plus, but is instead reborn in another world. He starts over at level 1 as jobless/classless and discovers that the new world's understanding of ranks, dungeons, and classes is far below what he knows from the game.

Name guidance: VRMMO テンペスト = VRMMO Tempest. SR(エスアール) = SR. 覇王ベノム = Overlord Venom or Hegemon Venom; keep one spelling consistent if used as a title/name. セラ＝ベルノート = Sera Belnote. Translate 勇者 as Hero, 転生 as reincarnation/reincarnate, 無職 as classless or jobless depending on whether it refers to RPG class, レベル１ as level 1, 二次職 as second-tier class/second job, 上級職 as advanced class, ダンジョン as dungeon, and 最終ボス as final boss.

Tone/style: VRMMO-to-isekai reincarnation fantasy with RPG systems, dungeon ranks, class/job mechanics, and a protagonist whose game knowledge makes him far beyond the new world's standards. Keep game terminology precise and consistent. The title phrase 俺、勇者じゃないですから should be rendered as I'm Not a Hero.
